name: Wagon Wheel Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. To make dressing, combine oil, vinegar, mustard, garlic, and lemon juice in a bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Cook pasta in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain and cool.
3. Place pasta in a large bowl. Heat olive oil in a skillet. Add green and red peppers and sauté until barely tender.
4. Add peppers and dill to the pasta. Pour dressing over the mixture and toss well to coat.
5. Chill, covered, until serving time.
